product_overview: Products Analytics Dashboard is a multi-tenant product intelligence platform for tracking winning and new products, reviewing saved ads, and analyzing advertising performance. It helps ecommerce teams explore product insights, manage saved items, and organize workspace-level preferences.
core_goals: Browse and analyze discovered products with filtering and insight charts
View detailed product analytics and marketing strategy analysis
Manage saved ads with ratings, notes, pricing, and collection organization
Authenticate into the platform and access personal or workspace-specific data
Manage account and workspace settings within an authenticated tenant

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to access the platform through login and account creation.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in registration details -> Submit registration form -> See account created confirmation
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit login form -> See validation feedback and remain on login page

features.name: Products Dashboard
features.description: Shows the main analytics dashboard for discovered products, including filters, summary stats, and product detail analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View products dashboard -> Filter products by country, category, and date range -> Observe the refreshed product list and updated analytics
Navigate to / -> View products dashboard -> Collapse the filter panel -> Expand the filter panel again -> Continue reviewing products
Navigate to / -> View products dashboard -> Select a product -> Open the details modal -> Review the timeline chart and marketing strategy analysis

features.name: Saved Ads
features.description: Lets users review saved products and manage their ratings, notes, pricing, and saved-item insights.
user_flows: Navigate to /saved-ads -> View saved products list -> Select a saved product -> Review its metrics and marketing strategy analysis
Navigate to /saved-ads -> View saved products list -> Edit the rating stars -> Update the notes -> Save the changes
Navigate to /saved-ads -> View saved products list -> Update the actual price -> Save the new price -> See the updated saved product information

routes.description: Saved ad campaigns and products list
Admin users list and roles management

features.name: Products Dashboard
features.description: Showing analytical insights, charts, and product listing
user_interactions: Filter products by country, category, and date range
Toggle collapse of the filter panel
Click on a product to open details modal and view timeline chart and marketing strategy analysis

features.name: Saved Ads
features.description: Manage saved ads, rating, notes, and collections
user_interactions: Click on a saved product to view its metrics and marketing strategy analysis
